mapper.select:
SELECT d.dish_id AS dishId, b.branch_id AS branchId, b.branch_name AS branchName, d.dish_name AS dishName, b.cuisine_type AS cuisineType, b.diet_mode AS dietMode, b.calories, b.protein, b.fat, b.carbs, COALESCE(ufs.file_path, dfs.file_path) AS previewUrl, COALESCE(s.cook_count, 0) AS cookCount, COALESCE(s.signature_flag, 0) AS signatureFlag, CASE WHEN sk.relation_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isSkilled FROM diet_dish_cooking_branch b INNER JOIN diet_dish d ON b.dish_id = d.dish_id AND d.del_flag = 0
LEFT JOIN diet_cook_dish_stat s ON s.dish_id = b.dish_id AND s.user_id = #{po.userId} AND s.del_flag = 0
LEFT JOIN diet_cook_skilled_dish sk ON sk.dish_id = b.dish_id AND sk.user_id = #{po.userId} AND sk.del_flag = 0
LEFT JOIN diet_user_dish_image uimg ON uimg.dish_id = b.dish_id AND uimg.group_id = #{po.groupId} AND uimg.del_flag = 0
LEFT JOIN sys_file_storage ufs ON ufs.storage_id = uimg.storage_id AND ufs.del_flag = 0
LEFT JOIN sys_file_storage dfs ON dfs.storage_id = d.cover_image_id AND dfs.del_flag = 0 WHERE b.del_flag = 0
AND d.dish_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{po.dishName}, '%')
AND b.cuisine_type = #{po.cuisineType}
AND b.diet_mode = #{po.dietMode}
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
